Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Oh my! An encounter with one of your world's exquisite treasures, right out of the blue![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}It makes sport of water, a precious resource and the very foundation of life. Such a sinful form of art...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I've heard of its mystical powers, wherein those who offer coin may have their wishes granted...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Or perhaps the offerings were far too insufficient to have attracted the fountain spirit's interest?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Fortunately, I anticipated this and brought a hefty sum of coins.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I shall make an opening bid of one million yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Then I must try my hand at this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Fortunately, I anticipated this and brought a hefty sum of coins.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I shall make an opening bid of one million yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Oh, forgive me. My enthusiasm simply couldn't be contained. I even brought some coin for the occasion.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I shall make an opening bid of one million yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I was so caught up in the excitement that I started tossing coins without giving my wish any thought.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I shall give it more careful consideration before I return here in the near future...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Hm? What is this facility here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I see there's a gentleman inside with quite the stern face...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}And these photographs displayed so prominently...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Hm... Would it be correct to presume that these are your version of my subjugation requests?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}What do they use as proof that the target has been subjugated?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}If they truly parallel my requests... then do they require a piece of the body?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I see... So the target must be captured alive.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}It must be a truly mysterious process, if the particulars elude even you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}If they do indeed parallel my requests, I wonder how they confirm whether or not a mission has been completed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Perhaps they too require a piece of the body? My interest is piqued...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Dancers, dictated by the sway of one's inner passions... A subterranean garden, flourishing with uninhibited desires...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Oh, what a pity... I had hoped to become part of the "scene."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Well, that was quite satisfying.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}But I'm overwhelmed... Everything looks so new and inviting. Everywhere I look, something catches the eye.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}...If you don't mind, could you perhaps recommend our next activity?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It appears the time has come to demonstrate my hidden talents...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}One may even challenge professional singers at the touch of a button at this "karaoke"![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}This "arcade"... I have heard of it before.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}If I am not mistaken, it is a playground where one sports with electronic fairies in exchange for tokens...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}They may also have games where one controls a crane's claw to win prizes... I'm eager to see it in action.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Ah, excuse me... Would you mind waiting for a moment?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...I hadn't noticed there was a fountain on this side as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}Yet another fountain, on the opposite side...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I see... So this place plays host to a trinity of fountain spirits.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}...I apologize for the wait. Let us continue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Am I correct to assume that I ought to punch this area with all my strength?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}Now then... I shall perform a song of exaltation for my master. Sing along if you will... La~Lala~♪[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}...Oh my. You've never heard this song before?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}Thank you for the invaluable experiences you've shared with me today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I consider this mission a complete success.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}This may sound forward, but... I'd like for you to accompany me again sometime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I returned to the Velvet Room with Elizabeth.[n]{f 1 1}
